ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO PLAINTIFF ADI SIMAYOF ON OCT-30-2019 - CONTINUED TO DEC-10-2019 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPT. 514 PURSUANT TO THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES FOR FURTHER OEX. KIMBERLY LEVY, ESQ. APPEARED FOR DEFENDANTS JODY TAYLOR, JEREMY JESSUP, JASON KORT AND GREGORY O'CONNELL, WHO WERE NOT PRESENT FOR THIS AFTERNOON'S PROCEEDINGS. PLAINTIFF ADI SIMAYOF WAS PRESENT IN PRO PER, PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE, BUT PLAINTIFF WAS WILLING TO PROCEED WITH THE EXAMINATION. NO FURTHER NOTICE REQUIRED. THE PARTIES WAIVE NOTICE OF THE 12/10/19 EXAMINATION DATE. PROCEEDINGS NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: GAIL DEKREON. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).

DEFENDANTS JODY TAYLOR, JEREMY JESSUP, JASON KORT, AND GREGORY O'CONNELL'S MOTION FOR AN AWARD OF ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 425.16 IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $36,147.50 IN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND $2,542.43 IN COSTS. BECAUSE DEFENDANTS PREVAILED ON THEIR SPECIAL MOTION TO STRIKE THE COMPLAINT, THEY ARE ENTITLED TO RECOVER THEIR ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS. (SEE MINI-MINUTES FOR FULL DETAILS) ORDER IS SIGNED. Motion And Notice Of Motion For Attorney_S Fees And Costs Pursuant To C.C.P. 425.16
Off Calendar May-01-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Gary Bosch, Esq., Telephone 415-4027716, Specialy appearing for Plaintiff;
Kimberly Levy, Esq., Dolan Law firm, Telephone 415-421-2800, appearing for Defendant(s) Jody Taylor et al;

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JODY TAYLOR, JASON KORT, GREGORY O'CONNELL, JEREMY JESSUP's Motion For Attorney's Fees And Costs Pursuant To C.C.P. 425.16.

Defendants Jody Taylor, Jeremy Jessup, Jason Kort, and Gregory O'Connell's motion for an award of attorney's fees and costs pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 425.16 is granted in the amount of $36,147.50 in attorney's fees and $2,542.43 in costs. Because Defendants prevailed on their special motion to strike the complaint, they are entitled to recover their attorney's fees and costs. (Code Civ. Proc. 425.16(c)(1).) However, the statute's legislative history shows that "the Legislature intended that a prevailing defendant on a motion to strike be allowed to recover attorney fees and costs only on the motion to strike, not the entire suit." (Lafayette Morehouse, Inc. v. Chronicle Publishing Co. (1995) 39 Cal.App.4th 1379, 1383 [holding that trial court erred when it awarded defendants fees for the entire suit]; see also S. B. Beach Properties v. Berti (2006) 39 Cal.4th 374, 381 ["the fee 'provision applies only to the motio to strike and not to the entire action.'"]; Wainland v. Law Offices of Mastagni, Holstedt & Chuiurazzi (2006) 141 Cal.App.4th 15, 21-22 [assuming section 425.16(c) is limited to an award of costs and attorney fees incurred in connection with the motion to strike, which encompasses costs and attorney fees incurred in challenging the undertaking submitted by the plaintiff to stay enforcement of the award pending appeal].) In calculating the award, therefore, the Court has excluded all but 3.7 hours of Mr. Gramly's time and has excluded 4.0 hours of Ms. Levy's time, as the excluded time was spent in connection with a demurrer, motion to strike, discovery, and other matters rather than in connection with the anti-SLAPP motion. Defendants have made a prima facie showing that the hourly rates they seek are reasonable, and Plaintiff has not presented any contrary evidence. Finally, Defendants are entitled to recover costs as prevailing parties, without regard to whether those costs were incurred in connection with the anti-SLAPP motion. (Code Civ. Proc. 1032(a)(4), 1033.5.) Moreover, Plaintiff failed to file a timely motion to strike or tax costs, as required by the California Rules of Court, and therefore is barred from challenging the amount of costs sought by Defendants. (Cal. R. Ct. 3.1700(b)(1), (4).)

Order is signed.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: W. Trupek, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
